embeds.description:
To use the Afip API, you need to follow these steps:

1. **Obtain Authorization**: First, you need to get a "Token Authorization" by making a POST request to the endpoint `https://app.afipsdk.com/api/v1/afip/auth`. You will need to provide parameters such as `environment` (use "dev" for development or "prod" for production), `tax_id` (CUIT), and `wsid` (web service ID) as per [Afip SDK Documentation](https://docs.afipsdk.com/paso-a-paso/instalacion#api-2).

2. **Make API Requests**: Once you have the token and sign, you can make requests to the AFIP web services. For example, to create an electronic invoice, you would send a POST request to `https://app.afipsdk.com/api/v1/afip/requests` with the necessary parameters, including the token and sign obtained earlier, as described in [API de factura electrónica de AFIP](https://afipsdk.com/blog/crear-factura-electronica-de-afip-via-api/).

Would you like more detailed instructions or a specific example? 

Sources:
- [Afip SDK Documentation](https://docs.afipsdk.com/paso-a-paso/instalacion#api-2)
- [API de factura electrónica de AFIP](https://afipsdk.com/blog/crear-factura-electronica-de-afip-via-api/)
